title: Evangelion 30 Showing in Bonn Germany
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion 3.0 Showing in Bonn, Germany             Quote Post by Ramiel² » Thu Jul 11, 2013 4:49 pm On the Festival "Animagic" they will have 3.0 in their Programm, amongside other nice movies. For everyone living in Germany or close to it, might worth considering. http://www.animania.de/animagic/animagic-2013-animotion-filmfestival/evangelion.html Personally i probably wont be able to be there, but maybe someone who waits for his chance to see 3.0 in a big screen, this will be his time! Dates are 26th and 27th July

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Fri Jul 12, 2013 5:10 pm WHAAT?? How do I only find out on such short notice? And I've already spent this month's worth of money... I can probably get to Bonn by train if I can convince Mom about the cash... and they're showing new GiTS, too, I must admit I didn't even know they made more... anyone know if it's any good? Compared to SAC and the original movies, I mean...
